rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings; avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Ensure all AGREE identifiers reference visible AADL features or declared helpers; remove invalid clauses if unresolved.
generic_rules: Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation bindings in implementation scopes.
Validate that all referenced identifiers exist in the current AADL scope before using them in AGREE.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents or paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use only valid AADL feature names and declared auxiliary variables in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not mix implementation-level references with component type contracts.
Do not reference undefined or non-visible identifiers in AGREE clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions beyond contract placement
